[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] '''Carigan''' was the governor of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bryx]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Rebellion]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Battle of Bryx]]. In the course of the battle he invented the [[Carigan defense]], which was later considered one of the most impressive planetary defenses and used as a textbook example in [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academies]].
